programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: Tony plans to murder his wife when he finds out that she had an affair with someone a year ago He blackmails an old college associate to execute the crime but things dont work out as planned

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Notorious Nun
programme.desc: Father Thomas ONeil Timothy Bottoms is murdered and a nun Sister Margaret Michele Greene with whom he was rumoured to be having an affair is arrested as the suspect in the scandalous crime Perry Mason Raymond Burr now a judge is asked by his pal Archbishop Stefan Corro to look into it With not only Mason but his secretary Della Street Barbara Hale and his recent investigative partner Paul Drake Jr William Katt on the case Margarets name may be cleared

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 204
programme.desc: TBH 204

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E07
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E07

programme.title: Munsters 112
programme.desc: Munsters 112

programme.title: Addams Family 123
programme.desc: Addams Family 123

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: After Hedley warns two hunters to leave the reserve and put out their campfire one of them starts a fire to drive the rhinos they want to hunt off the reserve and onto legal hunting territory The fire soon engulfs the reserve forcing animals to flee and with Jack and Paula observing a buffalo herd in the midst

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo is nominated for a membership in the only sorority in town But in order to be accepted she has to get a date with the schools star athlete Stonewall Jackson whose only interested in sports

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A handsome young Dr Bailey opens an office at the hotel but Kate is concerned there wont be any patients for him since everyone goes to Dr Stuart

programme.title: TBH 134
programme.desc: TBH 134

programme.title: TBH 125
programme.desc: TBH 125

programme.title: Munsters 125
programme.desc: Munsters 125

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An abnormally difficult child tests a psychologist

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A psychologist causes the terrors of a disturbed patient hes treating to haunt him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Knight 314
programme.desc: Knight 314

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A model uses a cursed compact to dispose of anyone who stands in the way of her success including her doctor and her lover

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Gilligan is bitten by a rare deadly insect The Professor informs him that he has 24 hours left to live

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos sneaks into an air base to complain about jet noise over the farm and accidentally touches classified material so when Luke and Kate come looking for Grandpa they are all suspected of espionage

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: To keep a priceless diamond out of KAOSs hands a jeweler sells it to 86 for an engagement ring for 99

programme.title: Smart 407
programme.desc: Smart 407

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear help lady trucker Snow White and her friends fend off attacks by the Hi-Ballers a gang of truckers who dont cotton to competition from women in Winslow County turf they control with corrupt cops Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: Using the microphone that Klink has installed in the barracks Hogan tricks Klink into contacting an underground member

programme.title: Mchale 322
programme.desc: Mchale 322

programme.title: Mchale 414
programme.desc: Mchale 414

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Bullwinkle 106
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 106

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain try to derail MADs plan to steal an entire train carrying sophisticated computers that will help their operation

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Gophers friend Phil offers him a job managing his hotel Magician Kens assistant Maggie is upset when he sends his brother Al to replace him in the act Hetty moves into a ships cabin to get closer to porter Charlie

programme.title: WKRP 108
programme.desc: WKRP 108

programme.title: WKRP 107
programme.desc: WKRP 107

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman must find another job when hes laid off due to budget cuts

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A man who can enter and manipulate peoples dreams is recruited by a government agency to help cure the President of the United States of his nightmares about nuclear war but stumbles upon an assassination plot

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus They discover a town that Daan helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens take over the members of a punk rock band and add a secret electronic signal to their music which will drive young people into a violent frenzy Meanwhile Kincaid begins a romance with his late brothers girlfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dan Mateo one of Alphas botanists believes that he can increase their food supply by communicating telepathically with his plants After passing out during one of his electronic experiments Alpha seems to become haunted by a murderous and disfigured spirit

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Army scout Cheyenne is court-martialed for cowardice when he wants to abandon Army horses the Army needs to raiders who always know where to strike The post commander is frustrated as is his wife who wants to return back east

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Hickok falls in love with a woman who belongs to an unwanted religious group but must first settle an old score with a gunfighter

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three escaped convicts leave a path of destruction behind them as well as causing friction between Keller and his girlfriend Connie

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF is tasked with defamation of Janos Karq a dangerous politician from the Eastern Block who intends to start a war with the West Joseph Baresh will be placed in the military prison Lubjanka where his testimonies shall implicate Karq

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne on an Army task is chased by the Sioux He wounds a miner so he stays to help the miner and his wife Three men wanted for selling faulty guns to the Sioux arrive with eyes for the wife and the gold although the Sioux threaten

programme.title: Music Scene
programme.desc: RUN FOR IT - Will Thompson Rock and Roll Video Show S01 Ep2 Two for Tuesday Music Featuring Flying Fish Kickstand Jenny - Love It or Leave It - Official Music V"

programme.desc: Hockey Night in Thailand

programme.title: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 004
programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 004

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Project Metalbeast
programme.desc: In 1974 an unhinged CIA agent injects himself with the werewolf blood he found After a killing spree his body is put in suspended animation then thawed out 20 years later by his crazy boss and a team of unsuspecting doctors

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Darcizzle
programme.desc: The Honest TRUTH About Owning a B.O.A.T. !!!! Kingfish Suck! Two Massive Florida ALLIGATORS! How To Catch and Cook an Alligator! Best Top 10 Florida Fishing Ga"

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Khalid El Moukadam v. Nouh El-Bachiri Souffiane Kaddouri v. Keng Superpro Sheena Widdershoven v. Katrin Dirheimer Armen Hovhannisyan v. Mesut Derin Luis Tavares v. Jegish Yegoian Ismael Lazaar v. Atha Kasapis Mohamed Khamal v. Jomthong Chuwattana

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tye Palmer v. Scott Rogan

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: It is Striker vs. Grappler! At Hard Knocks 50, John Woo and Jordan Van Heek fight an impressive short round. This episode of Out of the Cage focuses on John Woo and his path to his amateur debut fight.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Anis Dada v. Scott Turner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Peel back the curtain to find out the goals and challenges of a Mixed Martial Arts fighter’s everyday life, and how it’s not much different than yours. Featuring Colton Boxell.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Callum Jones v. Rikki Fortuna

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Luke Theriault v. Mike Wright

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Dawid Zoltaszek v. Ahmed Tijani Shehu

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Khadija Charradi v. Essilia Wurms

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alexander Shlemenko v. Brandon Halsey

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegade wreak havoc on Earth while disguised as Guardians and the terrified humans ask Leader-1 to take his people off Earth

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Orion a professional hunter gets Saw Boss permission to hunt Jayce without any interference Orion is fascinated by Jayces skill and wants him as a trophy prize Orion kidnaps Jayce and puts him on a planet for the hunt to begin

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Bruce Sato encounters a man suffering from a fever in the Alaskan snow and is soon infected with the same mysterious disease Matt assembles MASK to find the cure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Professor Hillary is about to decipher ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs that lead to the Golden Scarab with the secret to life itself But a mummy Sly Rax in disguise steals the hieroglyph tablet during the night

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The D-Boy File

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Red Horror Evil

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The beautiful MAD agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution Safety Tip Dont eat food that looks old or bad; prevent food poisoning

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides race to locate the ruins of an ancient GoBotic spacecraft which was carrying a powerful weapon when it crashed into the South American jungle long ago
